name: DSCR Label
helpText: Label shown next to the DSCR value.

name: DSCR Decimal Places
helpText: Number of decimal places for DSCR and covenant values.

name: Debt Service Decimal Places
helpText: Number of decimal places for the annual debt service value.

name: Auto-Scale Debt Service
helpText: Automatically abbreviate large values (K, M, B) for readability.

name: Tooltip Content
helpText: Hover tooltip text. Leave empty to hide.
default: Debt Service Coverage Ratio (DSCR) measures cash flow available to pay debt. A ratio > 1.30 is usually required by lenders.

name: Custom Accent Color (Optional)
helpText: Override theme accent color, e.g. #FF6B35. Leave empty for default cyan.
